productName: Legit Gold Infused Pre-roll Drunken Hashplant - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Drunken Hashplant, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
